Target_Architecture: Distributed Cross-Lingual Information Retrieval & Steganographic AI Network

backend-server.app/Http/Controllers/SearchController.ph: Orchestrates cross-lingual search tokens by routing Amharic user tokens to translation models before executing database retrieval queries.
backend-server.app/Models/User.php: Implements Eloquent lifecycle hooks to automatically mint sequential Vault Passport IDs upon student account registration validation.
backend-server.database/migrations/: Defines rigid tables for user attributes (Sex, Department, University ID), claims/patches, inverted index nodes, and bilingual dictionaries.

node-file-processor.server.js: Main express service loop routing document streams to localized storage buckets and isolating intense background computational threads from Laravel.
node-file-processor.services/ai_gatekeeper.js: Handles language model wrappers executing semantic classification to balance syllabus resources across computing departments while isolating micro-assessment artifacts.
node-file-processor.services/stego_cipher.js: Processes raw file byte encapsulation and executes LSB steganographic embedding directly within image pixel matrices.
